event: Still life with brioche, fruit, and rose
description: A golden-crusted brioche sits at the center of a white napkin on an ornate table. Peaches rest nearby on the right, and a cluster of green grapes lies at the front. A single white rose in bloom rises behind the bread. On the left, a small covered dish and darker fruits sit in shadow. A golden-handled knife rests on the napkin. The background is deep black, throwing the warm tones of the bread and fruit into luminous relief.
